name: RxSight, Inc.
business: RxSight, Inc. is a commercial-stage medical technology company that provides the RxSight Light Adjustable Lens system, comprising the Light Adjustable Lens (LAL) and Light Delivery Device (LDD), for customized vision after cataract surgery. The system is sold primarily to ophthalmic practices and ambulatory surgery centers in the U.S. and select international markets.

exposures.sentence: RxSight, Inc. is a commercial-stage medical technology company dedicated to providing high-quality customized vision to patients following cataract surgery.
We are in the early stages of incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) into our business activities and our product and service offerings.
